Sus_Term_Info__c: No active program.  No ES since 2011, no data submitted since 2008. Suspending but no susp letter will be sent.  ECAP notified. Larry, I did a quick scan of the files on MP and dug into my own memory bank a bit.  The original Supt, Tom DeBolt, was a strong supporter of the program and a positive reference, if I remember correctly.  I don?t know anything about his replacement.  There?s no indication that a CFU was ever conducted with him.  In June 2011, we were informed that the ES of record was no longer in place and were referred to the RS, Dr. Ritchie.  We were apparently unsuccessful in getting any response from Ritchie or the new Supt.  Suspension procedures were postponed as the Marketer at that time was attempting to intervene.  There is no record that the Marketer was successful.     My suggestion is that we officially suspend the district.
